text.title: Design Ops Foundations Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Design Ops Foundations output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: ritual_calendar missing critique OR system-review OR capacity-check
tool_inventory has tools with usage_pct < 0.5 that haven't been reviewed

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: ritual_calendar populated with a typed value
design_system_source populated with a typed value
capacity_model populated with a typed value
tool_inventory populated with a typed value
eng_handoff_template populated with a typed value
rationalization_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
